title: Department Manager Vacancy at Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services:
Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services!
